narrative:
Fairview Park-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 995 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.2 percentage points.
